case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS ANCHETA, ORLANDO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $673.82 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT ANCHETA, ORLANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANCHETA, ORLANDO $598.82 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $655.82 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $16.17 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ANCHETA, ORLANDO
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANCHETA, ORLANDO
